description: Style NoteCrafted from genuine leather and designed with loads of organiser space, this wallet from hidekraft strikes the right balance between style and convenience.Product DetailsThree fold textured black leather wallet with embossed branding on the frontTwo main compartmentsThree credit card slots and an id card slot on the leftThree credit card slots and a slip pocket in the centreCoin pocket on right with slip pocket Warranty: 180 daysMaterial and Care100% leatherWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSize11.5 cm x 9.5 cmWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
